headline: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
summary: Lego released a new $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine set. It was designed by Carl Merriam, known for other nostalgia-inducing Lego sets. Mario creator Miyamoto is reportedly pleased with the creation.

headline: Meta won’t have to face the next planned social media addiction trial
summary: Meta avoided a planned social media addiction trial in Los Angeles. The 15-year-old plaintiff accusing the platform of harm dropped the case. It was slated to be the second bellwether trial for legal arguments.

headline: Tesla’s revenues are bouncing back, but profits are still weak
summary: Tesla's Q2 2026 earnings report shows revenue recovery. The company saw improved demand and sales after a dismal two years. Despite revenue gains, profits for the EV company remain weak.

headline: Price-hiked iPads are a little cheaper right now
summary: Many Apple products saw price increases last month. A notable deal offers $150 off the 13-inch iPad Pro M5 with 512GB. The high-end iPad Pro is now available for $1,549 at Amazon.

headline: LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade Set Officially Announced
summary: LEGO officially unveiled its new Nintendo-themed Donkey Kong arcade set. The set features classic characters including Donkey Kong, Lady, and Jumpman. It marks the latest addition to LEGO's collaborative Nintendo collection.

headline: Save $1,500 Off an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D Gaming PC With RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM
summary: Gamers can save $1,500 on an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D gaming PC. The machine boasts an RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM. It offers an extremely powerful setup at a competitive price point.

headline: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra Review So Far
summary: An early review details the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, Samsung's newest flagship foldable. The device brings long-awaited improvements in battery and camera performance. However, its hefty $2099 price tag remains a significant drawback.

headline: Save $100 Off a Like New Asus ROG Xbox Ally X Handheld Gaming PC at Best Buy
summary: Best Buy offers $100 off a 'like new' Asus ROG Xbox Ally X handheld gaming PC. The Ally X is recognized as the most powerful Windows-based gaming handheld. This deal provides an opportunity to acquire the device at a reduced price.

headline: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
summary: The US and Saudi Arabia have signed a landmark "peaceful" nuclear cooperation agreement. The deal will grant US firms significant access to Saudi Arabia's nuclear energy program. It aims to strengthen strategic ties and energy collaboration.

headline: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers after US launches more strikes on Iran
summary: Houthis have claimed responsibility for new attacks on oil tankers. These claims follow additional US strikes targeting Iran. The attacks would mark the first in the Red Sea since a Houthi "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.

headline: PC Harper's widow criticises early prisoner release plan as Burnham to review scheme
summary: Lissie Harper, PC Harper's widow, has criticized a proposed early prisoner release plan. Reports suggest two of her husband's killers could be freed early under the scheme. Andy Burnham is scheduled to review the controversial policy.

headline: Most bus fares in England to be capped at £2 from January
summary: Most bus fares across England will be capped at £2 starting January. The government introduced the policy to help with the rising cost of living. This measure aims to provide financial relief and breathing room for commuters.
